title: rungia selangorensis
intro: Rungia selangorensis, also known as the Selangor Rungia or Rungia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold, and treating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Rungia selangorensis typically involve making a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
